subdomain.description: Your Lightspeed Retail (X-Series) account subdomain (the <subdomain> in https://<subdomain>.retail.lightspeed.app). Used to derive the API base URL.

api_key.description: Lightspeed Retail personal token / OAuth access token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
